=== sftp openghm <<<'pwd' ===
sftp> pwd
Remote working directory: /home/x-openghm
sftp> ls -la /anvil/scratch/x-openghm/slurmly_phase0
drwxr-xr-x    4 x-openghm x-ees260008     4096 Apr 26 12:30 .
drwx------    5 x-openghm x-ees260008     4096 Apr 26 12:30 ..
drwxr-xr-x    8 x-openghm x-ees260008     4096 Apr 26 12:32 jobs
drwxr-xr-x    2 x-openghm x-ees260008     4096 Apr 26 12:31 scripts

=== sftp version ===
sftp: illegal option -- V
usage: sftp [-46AaCfNpqrv] [-B buffer_size] [-b batchfile] [-c cipher]
          [-D sftp_server_command] [-F ssh_config] [-i identity_file]
          [-J destination] [-l limit] [-o ssh_option] [-P port]
          [-R num_requests] [-S program] [-s subsystem | sftp_server]
          [-X sftp_option] destination
